source: pterm registry search on Pinokio registry
decision_policy: Prioritize local-first capabilities that reduce production friction for Flowmatik, Kaizen and THE FOCUX.

shortlist.title: ComfyUI
shortlist.why: Strongest ComfyUI signal found: high save/check-in count, Windows support, AMD/NVIDIA/Apple support, broad image/video/audio tags.
shortlist.recommended_action: Install first if there is enough disk/time; otherwise keep current Remotion pipeline and install later.

shortlist.title: FreeCut
shortlist.why: Browser-based local video editor with multi-track editing and exports. Good bridge between manual editing and agent workflows.
shortlist.recommended_action: Install early as visual editor companion to Remotion.

shortlist.title: AI Video Composer
shortlist.why: Natural-language video editor powered by FFmpeg. Very aligned with Omni-Media and agent-driven editing.
shortlist.recommended_action: Evaluate after FreeCut; likely useful as a provider for video.edit.

shortlist.title: Whisper-WebUI
shortlist.why: Subtitle and transcription capability; useful for captions, repurposing podcasts and extracting content memory.

shortlist.title: Open WebUI
shortlist.why: High registry signal and broad LLM runner support. Useful as human-facing local LLM UI, but not a replacement for KAIZEN7 kernel.
shortlist.recommended_action: Install only after core content tools; KAIZEN7 already controls capability routing.

shortlist.title: n8n
shortlist.why: Workflow automation with good registry signal. Useful for scheduled distribution, research refresh and ecommerce ops.
shortlist.recommended_action: Install when workflows become recurring, not before.

shortlist.title: Stable Audio 3
shortlist.why: Good signal for local music/SFX generation. Useful for Flowmatik sound identity, but potentially heavier.
shortlist.recommended_action: Defer until visual/video pipeline is stable.

shortlist.title: Hermes Agent
shortlist.why: Interesting local agent with memory/skills; useful as a benchmark/provider, not as KAIZEN7 replacement.
shortlist.recommended_action: Evaluate later as an adapter target.

notable_deferred.title: Wan2GP / LTX / FramePack / VideoCrafter
notable_deferred.reason: Potentially powerful video generation, but heavy and GPU-sensitive. Defer until asset pipeline and storage budget are clear.

notable_deferred.title: DramaBox / VoxCPM / MOSS-TTS / ChatterBox
notable_deferred.reason: Promising TTS/voice cloning options, but many are NVIDIA-oriented. Start with existing local voice pipeline or Speaches/Kokoro API only when needed.

notable_deferred.title: Odysseus
notable_deferred.reason: Interesting local-first AI workspace for documents/research, but overlaps with KAIZEN7 memory/knowledge architecture. Evaluate later.
